chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Misc. Application No.587 of 2023 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ For order as to maintainability of instant Cr. Misc. Appln 13.11.2024. Mr. Tahir Hassan Qureshi, advocate for applicant. Mr. Saleem Akhtar Buriro, Addl. Prosecutor General, Sindh. Applicant has challenged an order dated 31.07.2023 dismissing his application under section 22-A & B Cr. P.C. for registration of FIR. I have heard learned counsel for the applicant. He has failed to show any illegality in the impugned order, not the least when applicant has an alternate remedy under section 200 Cr. P.C. This application has also been opposed by learned Additional Prosecutor General, Sindh. Therefore, this application is dismissed, however, the applicant is at liberty avail the remedy in accordance with law. The Cr. Misc. Application is accordingly disposed of. JUDGE HANIF
